title: OpenAI Formula Description Icon Clarification
description:
Review the OpenAI formula description icon that appears on fields with `calculatedFormula` values. The icon triggers an OpenAI-powered formula description when clicked.

After review, it was confirmed that the existing implementation was already correct and no changes were needed. The icon correctly appears only when a field has a calculated formula value from Salesforce.
acceptance_criteria: OpenAI icon appears only on fields with calculatedFormula values
Clicking the icon triggers the formula description feature
implementation_notes: No action taken. The existing implementation was confirmed to be working correctly. Icon displays conditionally based on the calculatedFormula field value from Salesforce.
comment_summary: Developer explained the existing formula icon behavior. Ryan confirmed no action was needed.
